summary: Frontend-only testing of CapActix-PMS static React prototype. Verified all 20 sidebar routes, role switcher, theme toggle, sidebar collapse, notifications, AI Assistant, Forms builder, and color palette. All flows pass with ZERO console errors and ZERO /api calls (as expected for static prototype). One minor branding leftover found: 'Clarity AI' label in AI Assistant chat header.

ui_bugs.issue: Hard-coded label 'Clarity AI' (line 217 of /app/frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.jsx) is leftover from the pre-rename branding. Should be 'CapActix AI' (or similar) to match the new 'CapActix-PMS' brand. Visible at top of conversation panel on /ai-assistant.

action_items: Optional: Rename 'Clarity AI' string in /app/frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.jsx (line 217) to align with CapActix-PMS rename. Everything else passes.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: The cdn-cgi/rum request returns ERR_ABORTED - this is Cloudflare's RUM analytics endpoint blocked by the preview environment, NOT an app issue. Safe to ignore.
Static prototype correctly makes zero /api calls per spec.
All 20 navigation entries use kebab-case data-testids consistently. The 'AI Staff Allocation' nav points to /ai-allocation/existing as expected (per App.js redirect).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: all 20 routes navigate without errors, role switcher updates badge+user name in header/sidebar footer and persists to localStorage 'capactix-pms-role', theme toggle persists to 'capactix-pms-theme' and toggles document.documentElement.dark class, sidebar collapses from 256px to 64px, notifications dropdown shows 4 items with unread badge, AI Assistant page loads with suggested questions+history, Forms page renders with field-text button. ZERO console errors, ZERO React warnings, ZERO failed network requests (other than Cloudflare RUM beacon). Colors are subtle muted navy/slate as requested. No 'Compiled with problems' overlay. Dashboard, AI Assistant, and dark-mode screenshots captured visually confirm the professional palette.
